layoutRegions.name: emergency-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: Readiness counts for break-glass paths, ready accounts, handoffs, and blocked drills.

layoutRegions.name: break-glass-ledger
layoutRegions.purpose: Emergency account inventory with scope, custodian, grant window, and readiness state.

layoutRegions.name: handoff-and-rehearsal-panels
layoutRegions.purpose: Contact proof, time-boxed access grants, rollback commands, and drill steps.

components.name: AccountCard
components.purpose: Focusable break-glass account card with scope, custodian, and grant window.
interactions: state badge distinguishes ready, handoff, and blocked paths
wrapped labels do not resize sibling cards

components.name: HandoffProof
components.purpose: Emergency contact channel, verification proof, and fallback instruction.
interactions: focus state is visible for keyboard review

components.name: AccessGrant
components.purpose: Time-boxed grant surface with target, limit, expiry, and rollback command.
interactions: rollback command wraps without horizontal overflow

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
